message:
feat(freeze): Migrate local variable opcodes to C builder (Phase 5)

Migrate 8 local variable opcodes to use the structured CBuilder API:
- get_loc0, get_loc1, get_loc2, get_loc3
- put_loc0, put_loc1, put_loc2, put_loc3

Added new builder helpers:
- getLocalExpr(idx) - Get context-aware local expression (locals[n] or frame->locals[n])
- emitGetLoc(idx) - Push local value onto stack with dup
- emitPutLoc(idx) - Free old value and store new from stack

The builder now handles 15 opcodes total:
- Phase 3: iterator_check_object, iterator_close, inc_loc
- Phase 4: get_loc_check, throw
- Phase 5: get_loc0-3, put_loc0-3
Plus helpers: emitExceptionCheck, emitErrorCheck

All 20 c_builder tests pass. Benchmarks:
- fib(45): 23.96ms AOT
- loop sumArray: 0.11ms AOT
